metadata.description: Analyze any local repo through Musk's 5-Step Algorithm and Goldratt's Theory of Constraints. Finds bottlenecks, dead code, tracked artifacts, rename drift, and over-engineering - then produces a specific, actionable report with a Week 1-4 roadmap.

plugins.name: musk-algo
plugins.description: Adds the /musk-algo slash command. Point it at a local repo path and get a deep flow analysis: what to delete first, what the primary bottleneck is, concrete complexity red flags with before/after examples, and a prioritized roadmap.
